chemaxon.fixers

Annotation Type FixerInfo


  • @Retention(value=RUNTIME)
public @interface FixerInfo
    This annotation is responsible for adding UI based meta data for StructureFixer implementations
    Since:
    5.9
    Author:
    Imre Barna

    • Optional Element Summary

      Optional Elements 
      Modifier and Type Optional Element and Description
      String actionStringToken
      Returns the action string token of the fixer.
      String description
      Returns the description of the fixer.
      String name
      Returns the name of the fixer.
      int priority
      Returns the priority of the fixer.

    • Element Detail

      • name

        public abstract String name
        Returns the name of the fixer.
        Returns:
        the name of the fixer
        Default:
        "Unnamed"

      • description

        public abstract String description
        Returns the description of the fixer.
        Returns:
        the description of the fixer
        Default:
        "No description"

      • actionStringToken

        public abstract String actionStringToken
        Returns the action string token of the fixer.
        Returns:
        the action string token of the fixer
        Default:
        ""

      • priority

        public abstract int priority
        Returns the priority of the fixer.
        Returns:
        the priority of the fixer
        Default:
        50
